_comment: IBKR holdings, schema v2 (#27). shares/cost synced from live IBKR positions 2026-07-10 (get_account_positions, read-only). bucket: "A" = index sleeve (never sold/timed, excluded from stock-book %); "B" = earned core, set manually once the owner judges a name grew there via the add rules AND passes fundamentals (no automatic detection yet, see homily_positions.py); omitted = "C", the default satellite bucket the 10%-cap warning applies to. currency: omitted = USD; set explicitly for non-USD names (excluded from the USD stock-book denominator, R12). Edit this file (not daily_run.py) when the book changes.
